description_long: This shotgun features a tactical, modern design with a matte black finish and a combination of metal and polymer components. It has a prominent folding stock extending from the rear, which appears to be made of metal and is designed for compact storage or transport. The fore-end includes a vertical grip for enhanced control, and the receiver is equipped with a rail system for mounting optics or accessories. The barrel is relatively short, suggesting suitability for close-quarters use, and the pistol grip is ergonomically shaped for a secure hold. The trigger guard is robust and squared, providing ample space for gloved fingers and additional protection.
description: A modern tactical shotgun with a folding stock, vertical foregrip, and matte black finish, designed for close-quarters use. Features include a rail system, ergonomic pistol grip, and a squared trigger guard.
description_view_0: Front view showing the muzzle, vertical foregrip, and the alignment of the folding stock behind the barrel.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the full length of the folding stock, the rail system on top, and the vertical foregrip beneath the barrel.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the folding stock, pistol grip, and the overall symmetry of the shotgun.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the folding stock, vertical foregrip, and the receiver details.
attribute_barrel_configuration: single-barrel, short tactical barrel with no visible ribbing or venting
attribute_trigger_guard_design: Squared, robust trigger guard with ample space and reinforced edges
